citation_tightness.note: Missing citations in Limitations section (corpus skew, tier distribution) and Methods section (expected vs actual tier distribution)

completeness.note: Missing primary trial evidence and regulatory status information despite checklist claiming 6/6 topics covered

flow.note: Logical progression from efficacy to safety to limitations, with clear section demarcations

hedging_appropriateness.note: Appropriate hedging in 'no consensus' statement but lacks explicit qualification for claims about FAIR-RAG's 'crucial' role

tone_consistency.note: Promotional language in 'foundational architecture for enterprise AI' and 'industrial best practices'
